description: Import the sprite at /home/ga/Desktop/lever_arm.png into OpenToonz. This sprite represents a mechanical arm with a hinge circle at the top. Rig the arm to rotate around the center of the hinge circle and animate a rotation from 0 degrees at Frame 1 to -90 degrees at Frame 20. Save the scene as /home/ga/OpenToonz/projects/pivot_rig.tnz and render Frame 20 to /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/pivot_test/frame_0020.png.
